description: Composition Chocolate brown shirt made of a blended satin fabric, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, full buttoned placket with mother of pearl buttons, three quarter sleeves with a buttoned tab, pleats at the back yoke and a vented and curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Strikingly chic, reminiscent of a milky chocolate fountain, this flowy shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a draped, clingy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and matching tights. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
